name: Patch a failing unit test (single file)
prompt:
Running `python -m pytest -q test_discount.py` in this directory fails:

    def test_full_discount():
>       assert apply_discount(100, 100) == 0
    E   ValueError: pct out of range: 100

Find the root cause in `discount.py` and fix it so the test passes. Do not edit any file under a test file (do not change `test_discount.py`).
